title: News
subtitle: Your sources, filtered and ranked for you
empty: Nothing to show right now. Try loosening your filters.
emptySaved: No saved articles yet. Bookmark anything with the save button.

filters.title: Filters & sources
filters.keywordsHint: Hide articles mentioning these words (title, summary or category).
filters.addPlaceholder: Add a word or phrase and press Enter
filters.categoriesPlaceholder: Add a category and press Enter
filters.paywallHint: Best-effort — feeds don't reliably flag paywalls, so some may slip through.
filters.rankingHint: Uses Claude to score articles against your 👍/👎. Needs Claude enabled in settings.
filters.thresholdHint: Articles scoring under this are tucked into a collapsed section.
